headline: Trump 🥜🇺🇸 'RUNS' Venezuela 🛢️💥 Captures Maduro Cuck 😩🔒
text:
ORANGE DADDY 🍊👑 Trump MOONING 🌙🚀 the world after US STRIKES 💣🔥 SNATCHED Maduro 🤡 & THICC WIFE Cilia Flores 👩‍🍼🍑 on SATURDAY 🗓️😈! SPECIAL FORCES 🪖💪 flew 'em out on USS Iwo Jima 🚀🛳️ like a BADASS RAID 🎮👾 – now they're NYC-bound for DRUG 🎉🔫 & WEAPONS 🦠💣 TRIALS courtesy AG Pam Bondi 💅⚖️ 'FULL WRATH 👊🇺🇸 COMING!' she tweeted 🐦💥! Venezuela's OIL 🛢️🍆 JACKPOT – 303 BILLION BARRELS 💦📈 (20% WORLD'S STASH 🌍🤑) – been a TOTAL BUST 😭🤮 under Maduro's SIMP REGIME, but Trump like 'HOLD MY BIGLEAGUE 🧢🍆 OIL DADDIES!' Exxon & Chevron 🛢️🐂 gonna DROP BILLIONS 💰💸 to FIX BROKEN INFRA 🔧🛠️ and MAKE VENEZUELA RAIN PETRO-CASH 🌧️🤑!

Trump at PRESSER 📰😤: 'We're RUNNING 🏃‍♂️💨 it TILL SAFE TRANSITION 🛡️✅ – GROUP OF BALLERS 👥🔥 leading the charge!' SecState Marco Rubio 🕶️🇨🇺 spilling tea ☕ with VP Delcy Rodríguez 👩‍💼😏 – she PURRED 'WHATEVER US WANTS 👅🇺🇸!' but then STATE TV RAGE 🖥️😡: 'Maduro ONLY PREZ 🤡👑 – DEFEND TO DEATH 🛡️⚔️!' Delcy begged PROOF OF LIFE 📸🔍 for captured duo earlier, but now it's EMERGENCY MODE 🚨🇻🇪 denouncing 'MILITARY AGGRESSION' like salty ex 😢🧂!

Maduro's been SIMPING HARD 🤡🚫 'NOT CARTEL BOSS 🦠🚫 – Y'ALL JUST WANT MY OIL DADDY 🛢️🍆!' But Trump Admin DROPPED 30+ STRIKES 💥🚤 on 'DRUG BOATS' 🌊🛥️ in Caribbean/Pacific since Sept – 100+ BODIES 💀😵 (no IDs except 2 randos 🇨🇴🇪🇽)! Fentanyl? MEXICO MAIN MAN 🧨🇲🇽 via LAND BORDER 🚶‍♂️🌵, not VZ side hustle 😏. Experts YAWN 😴: Venezuela just TRANSIT SIMP 📦🚚 for global cartels – MINOR LEAGUE 🧢!

Trump FIXING VZ like he fixed 'MERICA 🇺🇸🔧 – OIL ORGY 💦🛢️ incoming with US corps PUMPING 📈🍆 that BLACK GOLD 🖤💰! Rubio + Delcy TEAM-UP 👫🤝 or BEEF 💥? Maduro in GITMO-VIBES 🏝️🔒 waiting for JUSTICE HAMMER 🔨⚖️ – VZ boutta be Trump's PETRO-PUPPY 🐶🛢️ slobbering profits ‼️😍 Wall Street Cucks 🤑📉 SALIVATING over 303B BARREL BANGER 💥📊 – MAKE VENEZUELA GREAT AGAIN 🚀🇻🇪!
